title: IIM Nagpur Junior Executive/Executive Academic Office Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Management Nagpur (IIM Nagpur) Junior Executive/Executive Academic Office Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Indian Institute of Management Nagpur. Has been announced through the IIM Nagpur Junior Executive/Executive Academic Office Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 35 years who have a Graduate degree with first class or equivalent grade in any discipline from a reputed University/Institute are eligible to apply for these Junior Executive/Executive Academic Office vacancies. basic_details.job_title: IIM Nagpur Junior Executive/Executive Academic Office Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Nagpur (IIM Nagpur) Junior Executive/Executive Academic Office Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Indian Institute of Management Nagpur. Has been announced through the IIM Nagpur Junior Executive/Executive Academic Office Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 35 years who have a Graduate degree with first class or equivalent grade in any discipline from a reputed University/Institute are eligible to apply for these Junior Executive/Executive Academic Office vacancies. The online application process for IIM Nagpur Jun

qualification.details: Graduate degree with first class or its equivalent grade in any discipline from a reputed University/Institute. A Post-Graduate degree, with at least 55% marks or its equivalent grade, preferably in Management, would be desirable.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Nagpur Junior Executive/Executive – Academic Office recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIM Nagpur Junior Executive/Executive – Academic Office positions is 30th May 2026. Ensure all your details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: A graduate degree with first class or its equivalent grade in any discipline from a reputed University/Institute is the minimum qualification. A postgraduate degree is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Executive/Executive – Academic Office role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Executive/Executive – Academic Office post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the IIM Nagpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Executive/Executive – Academic Office post at IIM Nagpur will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Executive/Executive – Academic Office position at IIM Nagpur is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIM Nagpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Nagpur is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. It is advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online on or before the last date. You can use the 'Apply Online' link provided in the Important Links section or visit the official website of IIM Nagpur.
